reason: Both answers reach the same core verdict (migrate to managed K8s, use a short-term contractor to stabilize/execute the migration, avoid a single replacement hire). Answer B additionally covers immediate credential/access rotation after the departure and explicitly flags the 40-services-for-10-engineers ratio as an architecture smell worth consolidating, hitting a key point Answer A omits entirely. Answer A's extra specificity on managed control-plane pricing elaborates a point both already make rather than adding new decision-relevant information. B is more complete against the rubric's key points.
